name: vivi-of-the-void
description: WordPress theme for Vivi of the Void
author: Paul Morris

scripts.bundle: rm -rf ../vivi-of-the-void.zip && sass --no-source-map sass:. && rtlcss style.css style-rtl.css && dir-archiver write --src . --dest ../vivi-of-the-void.zip --profile compat --includebasedir --exclude .DS_Store .stylelintrc.json .eslintrc .git .gitattributes .github .gitignore README.md composer.json composer.lock node_modules vendor package-lock.json package.json .travis.yml phpcs.xml.dist sass style.css.map yarn.lock bin .env
